title: TPB BTCUSDT 1h: First valid test after schema fix (tp1R + pullbackTouchAtr)
content: TrendPullbackEngine (archetype=trend_pullback) has never been tested with correct parameter names. Prior sessions showed degenerate behavior because the schema mapped tpR->tp1R and pullbackAtrTolerance->pullbackTouchAtr - the engine silently ignored old names and ran at hardcoded defaults. Schema fix shipped 2026-05-07. This hypothesis: the TPB entry mechanism (EMA50>EMA200 stack, pullback to EMA20 within pullbackTouchAtr*ATR, reclaim candle with composite signal score >= 0.55) has a profitable signal on BTCUSDT 1h with the CORRECT parameters now being honored. Expected n=30-80 trades at 1h given the 4h bias filter (EMA stack check on 4h timeframe). V11 gates required: n>=100, CI_lower>1.0, +20bps positive, PSR>=0.95, walk-forward ROBUST.

structured_data.expected_n_range: 30-80 per draw (4h bias filter limits 1h entries)
structured_data.mechanism: EMA50>EMA200 trend stack, pullback to EMA20 within ATR tolerance, reclaim candle quality gate, composite score>=0.55
structured_data.anti_correlation_argument: TPB fires on PULLBACK (price returning to EMA20 after overshooting), VBO fires on BREAKOUT EXPANSION - structurally opposite conditions. Expected Spearman corr < 0.30.
structured_data.prior_null_screen_verdict: DEGENERATE_EDGE on 1h (schema broken: params ignored, frequency=2-15 draws). THIS is the first test with schema fix.
structured_data.risk: 4h bias filter may still cause frequency starvation. If n<20 per draw: pivot immediately to TPB BTCUSDT 4h (no cross-timeframe conflict at native 4h)
structured_data.funding_rate_backup: FCARRY archetype is now unblocked (2026-05-09 backfill fix). If TPB fails: test FCARRY BTC 1h with correct funding data.
